Our professional ant control services protect Spuyten Duyvil residents from carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants with targeted treatments. faqs.question: Why are ant problems so common in Spuyten Duyvil?
faqs.answer: Spuyten Duyvil's location between two rivers creates higher humidity levels that attract ants seeking moisture. The area's mature trees, gardens, and proximity to parks provide ideal nesting sites, while older building foundations common in this historic neighborhood offer easy entry points for foraging ants.

faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Spuyten Duyvil?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Spuyten Duyvil range from $350 to $550 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species. This includes a thorough inspection, targeted treatment, and follow-up service to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Spuyten Duyvil homes?
faqs.answer: Spuyten Duyvil residents most frequently encounter carpenter ants (which can damage wood structures), pavement ants that nest in foundation cracks, odorous house ants attracted to kitchens, and occasionally pharaoh ants in larger apartment buildings. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment method.
